backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing a payment submission system with Stripe integration, user profiles, masked card storage, and role-based access control (admin/user permissions).
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that the PaymentForm component was updated to remove Internet Identity authentication requirements, allowing unauthenticated payment form submission.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing their purpose and key implementation details.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including colors, borders, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React app titled 'Payment Submission Form' that mounts the app at the root div and loads the main TSX entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app entry defining TanStack Router routes for the payment and admin pages, plus a shared Layout with a sticky header, navigation links, and a footer with caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin dashboard component that displays payment record statistics (total submissions, total amount, average transaction) and a paginated data table with masked card numbers and formatted timestamps.
frontend/src/components/AdminPasswordGat: Password gate component for admin access that requires Internet Identity login first, then verifies an admin password via the backend before granting access to the AdminPanel.
frontend/src/components/CreditCardVisual: Renders a styled visual credit card component displaying card number, holder name, and expiry date with decorative chip, shine overlay, and VISA branding.
frontend/src/components/PaymentForm.tsx: A multi-field payment form with client-side validation, card number/expiry formatting, live credit card visual preview, and submission via the useSubmitPayment mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/POSMachineVisual: Renders a decorative POS terminal illustration with a screen, keypad, card slot, and an NFC/tap-to-pay indicator using pure Tailwind styling.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, reinitializing it when the Internet Identity changes and invalidating dependent queries accordingly.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context with login/logout functionality, identity persistence via AuthClient, and a React context provider/hook for consuming auth state.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for submitting payments, fetching all payment records, and verifying admin passwords against the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Inter and Poppins fonts, configuring Tailwind with OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for theming, and defining utility classes for card gradients, glows, and shadows.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPage.tsx: Admin dashboard page that gates access behind a password component and renders the AdminPanel once authenticated, with sign-out functionality that clears identity and query cache.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentPage.tsx: Customer-facing payment page that displays a PaymentForm alongside decorative credit card/POS machine visuals, trust badges, and a review snippet on larger screens.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module for extracting URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with helpers to persist, retrieve, and clear those values via sessionStorage.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom fonts, an oklch-based color palette (emerald, sky, semantic tokens), extended border radii, box shadows, and animation keyframes.
project_state.json: Project state manifest (version 7) describing the app's features, architectural notes, known issues (form submission failure, admin password gate), and fix requests for the payment and admin flows.
